text:
/ci1 1 また、見たことのないダーカー！
どんな動きをしてくるんだろう……

/ci1 1 一目瞭然だろう？
遠距離から攻撃してくるタイプだ。
機動力も悪くなさそうだ。

/ci1 1 弱点は頭上の赤い部分だろうね。
あの赤い鼻を攻撃してやれば
そのうち頭を下げるはずだ。

/ci1 1 Another Falspawn I've never seen before!
What sort of tricks does this one
have up its sleeves?

/ci1 1 It should be obvious at a glance that
it's a long-range attacker. A considerably deft
one, at that.

/ci1 1 Its weakness is likely the red section
on top of its head. Attack the red nose, and it
should fall soon enough.

また、見たことのないダーカー！
どんな動きをしてくるんだろう……

一目瞭然だろう？
遠距離から攻撃してくるタイプだ。
機動力も悪くなさそうだ。

弱点は頭上の赤い部分だろうね。
あの赤い鼻を攻撃してやれば
そのうち頭を下げるはずだ。

Another Falspawn I've never seen before!
What sort of tricks does this one
have up its sleeves?

It should be obvious at a glance that it's a
long-range attacker. A considerably deft one,
at that.

Its weakness is likely the red section on top
of its head. Attack the red nose, and it should
fall soon enough.
